texto: A world full of people who want to know what you will be, what is your skill and what is your purpose. In the north, if a man had come and said "What will you be? What will you do?" I would have laughed at this kind of person that lives all the time in the future.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Daniel Mason que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “A world full of people who want to know what you will be, what is your skill and what is your pur…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre trabalho, career, future, com foco em future e vida.
